name: intervuex
description: Intervuex — Automated Interview Scheduling Platform (MERN Stack)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run setup:env
scripts.setup:env: cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env && echo '✅ .env files created. Please fill in your credentials.'

author: Intervuex Team
